allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; events=[json.loads\(l\) for l in sys.stdin]; types=set\(e['type'] for e in events\); pages=set\(e.get\('page',''\) for e in events\); print\('Types:', types\); print\('Pages:', pages\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d['total'], 'events:', len\(d['events']\), 'tracking:', d['tracking']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d['total'], '| events returned:', len\(d['events']\), '| tracking:', d['tracking']\)")
PowerShell(if \(Test-Path C:\\Projects\\ShareDo-Tools.zip\) { "Exists: $\(\(Get-Item C:\\Projects\\ShareDo-Tools.zip\).Length\) bytes" } else { "Does not exist" })

PowerShell(& "$env:SystemRoot\\System32\\tar.exe" -tf C:\\Projects\\ShareDo-Tools.zip | Select-Object -First 30; "---"; "Total entries: $\(\(& "$env:SystemRoot\\System32\\tar.exe" -tf C:\\Projects\\ShareDo-Tools.zip | Measure-Object\).Count\)")

PowerShell($dirs = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Projects\\ShareDo-Tools\\cache\\ux-user-data" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($dirs\) { $dirs | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\) - modified $\($_.LastWriteTime\)" } } else { "directory exists but is empty or no subdirs" })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "C:\\Projects\\ShareDo-Tools\\cache\\ux-storage-state\\preprod.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; "Cookies count: $\($j.cookies.Count\)"; "---"; $j.cookies | ForEach-Object { $exp = if \($_.expires -eq -1\) { "SESSION" } else { \([DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeSeconds\([int64]$_.expires\)\).ToString\(\) }; "$\($_.name\)  | domain=$\($_.domain\)  | expires=$exp" })
